zh.lifeSummary: 當David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford於1405年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德時，他的父親Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford18歲，母親Lady Majory Dunbar16歲。他於大約1423年3月與Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1445年1月24日在英國蘇格蘭安格斯阿布洛阿斯享年40歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭登迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford于1405年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德时，他的父亲Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford18岁，母亲Lady Majory Dunbar16岁。他于大约1423年3月与Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford在英国苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1445年1月24日在英国苏格兰安格斯阿布洛阿斯享年40岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰登迪。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford was born in 1405, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, was 18 and his mother, Lady Majory Dunbar, was 16. He married Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford about March 1423, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 24 January 1445, in Arbroath, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Dundee, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford est né en 1405, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Majory Dunbar, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford environ mars 1423, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 janvier 1445, à Arbroath, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Dundee, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford 1405 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford 18 und seine Mutter Lady Majory Dunbar 16. Er hat um März 1423 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Januar 1445 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Arbroath, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dundee, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford è nato il nel 1405 nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Lady Majory Dunbar, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford circa marzo 1423, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 gennaio 1445, nel Arbroath, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Dundee, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawfordが1405年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで生まれた時，父Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawfordは18歳，母Lady Majory Dunbarは16歳であった。約1423年3月にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードでMarjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1445年1月24日にイギリススコットランドアンガスアルブロアスで40歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダンディーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford(이)가 1405년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Majory Dunbar(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1423년 3월 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1445년 1월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 아브로스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 던디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford nasceu em 1405, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Lady Majory Dunbar, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford aproximadamente março de 1423, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de janeiro de 1445, em Arbroath, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Dundee, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford родился в 1405 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Majory Dunbar, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford около марта 1423 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 января 1445 г. в местности арброат, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности дунди, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford nació en 1405, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Lady Majory Dunbar, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford aproximadamente marzo de 1423, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de enero de 1445, en Arbroath, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Dundee, Escocia, Reino Unido.
